notes: v0.16.68 — RIFT MINI-BOSSES live (4 archetypes, random pick) + MODULE node reveal popup. (1) New scripts/mini_boss.gd Combatant subclass. Rift MINI-BOSS nodes now spawn one of 4 random archetypes: TURRET CORE (4 rotating arms, downbeat-synced 5-shot spreads; phase 2 detaches into orbiting orb chargers), SPLITTER (big diamond that splits into 4 homing chasers on every 1/3 HP loss), RAIL SENTINEL (hex tank that charges + sweeps 90° rail beams, dual rails at 50%), SWARM QUEEN (armoured triangle spawning 3 drone minions every 4s). HP and attack rate scale per rift difficulty. (2) MODULE cache nodes now pop a centred reveal card showing the granted module's hex icon (real procedural slot glyph), name, rarity, slot, active class, and full bonus text. CLAIM button dismisses. The drop targets your active class. Windows only.
